title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: School Office Hours
questions.text: The school office will close at 2 p.m. on Friday because staff are attending training. Students needing travel forms for the weekend should collect them before lunch.
questions.question: What does the notice warn students?

options.C: They have less time than usual to get forms.
options.A: Travel forms cannot be used at weekends.
options.B: Staff training has been cancelled on Friday.

questions.explanation: The office closes early, so forms must be collected before lunch.

questions.heading: Message from Maya to Alex
questions.text: Alex, I’ve checked the weather for our walk. It may rain later, but the morning looks fine. Shall we start earlier and finish before lunch instead of going after school?
questions.question: What is Maya suggesting?

options.A: Changing the time because of the weather.
options.B: Cancelling the walk until next week.
options.C: Walking after school if it rains.

questions.explanation: Maya suggests walking in the morning to avoid later rain.

questions.heading: History Club
questions.text: This term, history club will make a short film about the town during the 1960s. We need students to act, research old photographs and help with costumes. No filming experience is necessary.
questions.question: Who is the poster trying to attract?

options.B: Students interested in several film-making roles.
options.A: Students who already know how to film.

questions.explanation: The club needs actors, researchers and costume helpers, with no filming experience required.

questions.heading: From: Ben / Subject: Lunch tomorrow
questions.text: I can still meet you for lunch tomorrow, but I have to be back at school by one. Could we go to the sandwich place instead of the restaurant? It’ll be quicker.
questions.question: Why does Ben suggest the sandwich place?

options.C: He has limited time for lunch.
options.A: He dislikes the restaurant food there.
options.B: He wants to miss school tomorrow.

questions.explanation: Ben must be back by one, so he needs a quicker lunch.

questions.heading: Room 4 Project Work
questions.text: Please leave the model houses on the back table until Friday. They are still drying, and moving them too soon may damage the paint. Finished labels can be placed beside them.
questions.question: What does the label tell students?

options.A: They should not move the models yet.
options.B: They must paint the models again.
options.C: They should put labels underneath them.

questions.explanation: The models are drying and may be damaged if moved.
